tldr: Jonathan Milan again, his second of the week and fourth of the year. Pan-flat Dubai sprint, Erlend Blikra second, Matteo Malucelli third.

narrative.headline: Milan doubles up
narrative.body: Pan-flat Dubai stage from Al Mamzar Park to Hamdan Bin Mohammed Smart University. Bunch sprint, Lidl-Trek lead-out, second straight Milan win of the week.

gcImpact.headline: GC unchanged
gcImpact.body: Evenepoel keeps the leader's jersey, Jebel Hafeet still to come.

riderPerformances.name: Jonathan Milan
riderPerformances.narrative: Second straight win, fourth of the year. The team's sprint-train depth on display.
